TCI-CDE-2.2.vcd: Coming from TCI – Cloud Director Edition 2.2, VMware Cloud Director must be upgraded in sequence: 10.3.3.x → 10.4.3 → 10.6.1 (do not skip intermediate versions; 10.6.1 is the 5.0.2 target).

sourceLabels.TCI-CDE-3.0: Telco Cloud Infrastructure – Cloud Director Edition 3.0
sourceLabels.TCI-CDE-2.7: Telco Cloud Infrastructure – Cloud Director Edition 2.7
sourceLabels.TCI-CDE-2.2: Telco Cloud Infrastructure – Cloud Director Edition 2.2

sourceGroups.label: Telco Cloud Infrastructure – Cloud Director Edition

notes: When upgrading VMware Cloud Director from Telco Cloud Infrastructure 2.2, follow the chained sequence 10.3.3.x > 10.4.3 > 10.6.1.
Telco Cloud Infrastructure – Cloud Director Edition 2.7 must first be upgraded to 3.0 before moving to the target.
Depending on whether you run CNF or VNF workloads, skip the components that are not relevant to your deployment.
